prompt: A screenshot-style composition of an AI image generation chat interface on a light gray app background, centered inside a rounded white panel with a soft drop shadow. Near the top is a large pale mint-green chat bubble containing a long Chinese prompt in black sans-serif text, describing a hand-drawn food map of Chengdu. Beneath it, aligned slightly left of center, is a square illustrated map image with rounded corners. The map is a whimsical hand-painted tourist food map titled in large Chinese calligraphy at the upper left: 成都! 吃货暴走地图. The subject is Chengdu, presented as a vintage hand-drawn local cuisine map with warm beige paper texture, watercolor ink outlines, and a playful artisanal travel-poster feel. The map shows simplified streets, landmarks, and district labels in Chinese, not geographically exact, but cute and decorative. Place exactly 12 featured food locations, each marked with a numbered red dot and a small Chinese label, each paired with a detailed illustrated dish. Include 12 dishes total: 1) a bowl of skewers in red chili broth, 2) a bowl of sweet water noodles, 3) rabbit head specialty, 4) guokui or stuffed baked flatbread, 5) hot pot, 6) maocai, 7) dan dan noodles, 8) hongyou chaoshou or chili oil wontons, 9) bobo chicken, 10) fuqi feipian, 11) a spicy stir-fried dish, 12) another classic Chengdu snack platter. Add a few Chengdu landmarks sketched in miniature around the roads, including a pagoda-like tower, traditional gate architecture, modern city buildings, and a central emblematic structure. Frame the entire map with a decorative border made of red chili peppers, green vines, and small leaves. Use a warm color palette dominated by chili red, mustard yellow, olive green, tea brown, and muted jade. In the lower right corner of the map, include a small legend box labeled 图例说明 with 4 legend items, each with a tiny icon and Chinese text, plus a compass rose with N, E, S, W. Add many handwritten-style Chinese road names and annotations throughout. Outside the image, the interface includes small gray action icons beneath the green chat bubble on the right, a page indicator reading 2/2, an Edit pill button overlapping the lower left of the map image, a circular download/share button at the lower right of the image, and a sparse bottom toolbar with 4 small reaction/action icons. Overall look: clean modern chat UI presenting a generated square illustration, with the map as the visual focus.
